/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FireSimulationUI.dir/include/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o FireSimulationUI  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
